geography.data_source: GHMC ward map 2020, Cyberabad zone boundary shapefiles, HUDA layout plans

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Rangareddy district tables, rapid tech-driven growth estimated at 5.5% CAGR post-2012, high literacy from IT workforce

income_profile.data_source: NASSCOM Telangana IT industry report 2023, Glassdoor/AmbitionBox Hyderabad IT salary surveys, PLFS 2022-23, adjusted for HiTech City concentration

commute_profile.data_source: HMR Blue Line ridership 2023, Cyberabad traffic study 2022, higher metro dependency than Chennai OMR due to Blue Line extension to Raidurg

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from high-income IT corridor behaviour, lowest fare sensitivity, highest digital diffusion speed, Lokniti-CSDS 2024 Telangana data

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from IT corridor workplace networks, high digital connectivity, low cross-income interaction in gated tech parks

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Madhapur restaurant and food court strip, tech park canteen employment
HMR HiTech City station exit surveys, station area vendor footfall estimates
Estimated from Swiggy/Zomato delivery concentration data for Madhapur area

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: IT Corridor template from AGENT_SPEC.md, directly applicable to HiTech City/Madhapur tech cluster — the reference zone for this template alongside BLR_WHITEFIELD

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from NASSCOM Hyderabad chapter, IT park management bodies, Madhapur RWA concentration
